title: oenothera fruticosa var. incana
intro: Oenothera fruticosa var. incana, also known as shrubby evening primrose, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Oenothera fruticosa var. incana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, often used to treat various health conditions.
